languages.text: "Старейшины спустились в бункер — нести радостную весть Детям Искупления! Совсем скоро мы сбросим ледяные оковы Гордости Сантиэля!"

traits.locale_text: "Старейшины спустились в бункер — нести радостную весть Детям Искупления! Совсем скоро мы сбросим ледяные оковы Гордости Сантиэля!"
"Старейшины спустились в бункер — нести радостную весть Детям Искупления! Совсем скоро мы сбросим ледяные оковы Гордости Сантиэля!"

languages.text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"
languages.original_text: "Старейшины спустились в бункер — нести радостную весть Детям Искупления! Совсем скоро мы сбросим ледяные оковы Гордости Сантиэля!"

traits.locale_text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"
"The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"
"The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"

languages.text: "Der Älteste ging zum Bunger, um den Kindern der Erlösung die frohe Botschaft zu überbringen! Es wird nicht mehr lange dauern, bis wir die eisigen Fesseln von Santiels Stolz abwerfen!"
languages.original_text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"

languages.text: "L'aîné est descendu au bunger pour annoncer la joyeuse nouvelle aux enfants de la Rédemption ! Nous ne tarderons pas à nous débarrasser des chaînes glacées de l'orgueil de Santiel !"
languages.original_text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"

languages.text: "长老下山向救赎之子传达喜讯！用不了多久，我们就能摆脱桑提尔傲慢的冰冷枷锁！"
languages.original_text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"

languages.text: "¡El anciano bajó al bunger para dar la alegre noticia a los Hijos de la Redención! No tardaremos en soltar los gélidos grilletes del Orgullo de Santiel!".
languages.original_text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"

languages.text: 長老は "贖罪の子供たち "に喜ばしい知らせを伝えるため、バンガーに向かった！サンティエルのプライドという氷の束縛から解き放たれる日も、そう遠くはないだろう！"
languages.original_text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"

languages.text: "İhtiyar, Kefaretin Çocuklarına sevinçli haberi vermek için bunger'a indi! Santiel'in Gururu'nun buzdan prangalarından kurtulmamız uzun sürmeyecek!"
languages.original_text: "The elder went down to the bunger to deliver the joyous news to the Children of Redemption! It will not be long before we cast off the icy shackles of Santiel's Pride!"
